name: Light Fruit Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean sultanas and slice pineapple thinly; halve cherries.
2. Mix and sift flour, baking powder, and spices in a bowl.
3. Add half of the fruit mixture to the prepared cake pan(s).
4. In a large bowl, cream butter and gradually beat in sugar until well combined.
5. Beat in eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
6. Alternately fold in the remaining flour mixture with the juice and rind of the citrus fruits, beating well after each addition.
7. Gently stir in the almond extract.
8. Add the fruit to the creamed mixture; combine until thoroughly blended.
9. Scatter the split almonds over the batter, reserving some whole for topping.
10. Pour the mixture into cake pans lined with three thicknesses of greased wax paper.
11. Bake at 275°F (135°C) for approximately 3 hours or until firm and a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
12. Cool on a rack until thoroughly cold before removing from pans. Wrap and store in foil. Makes 2 large cakes or 1 large and 2 loaf cakes.
